docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF HEARING RE: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER MBNA AMERICA BANK, N.A. HEARING SET FOR JAN-24-2005 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
